subtitles.bike_arcade_voice_start: 三条车道。稳住位置，别乱换线。
subtitles.bike_arcade_voice_last_life: 只剩一次机会。路况已经把意思表达得很清楚了。
subtitles.bike_arcade_voice_result: 骑行结束。本次路况结论已经生成。

music.prompt: Immediate-start campus bicycle arcade cue for the first meters. Sparse pulse, wide gaps, restrained momentum, and a clean loop point.
music.instruments: soft square-wave pulse, muted marimba, sparse bicycle bell

music.prompt: Immediate-start campus bicycle traffic escalation. Layered rhythmic motion, tighter spacing, comic congestion, and enough room for action cues.
music.instruments: layered bicycle bells, dry toms, clipped pulse bass

music.prompt: Immediate-start final bicycle sprint. Rapid forward motion, short repeating figures, firm downbeat, and no long build or vocal layer.
music.instruments: rapid hi-hats, bright arpeggiator, tight electronic kick

music.prompt: Immediate compact arcade result bed. Resolved four-note motif, clear landing, low activity after the first phrase, suitable under either outcome cue.
music.instruments: warm FM chords, glass bell, soft electronic snare

sfx.description: short lateral servo swipe ending in one clean mechanical click
fast bicycle bell pass-by with a narrow airy sweep
dry bicycle metal impact with a brief tire scrape
low two-note health loss drop with a clipped digital crack
bright ascending checkpoint ping with three compact steps
compact tape-stop dip followed by a dry lock click
quick upward restart sweep followed by a clean tick
short clean arcade victory fanfare with a firm final note
descending three-note failure signal with a muted stop
soft mechanical arcade button press with a small confirm tick

narration.text: Three lanes. Settle in and hold your line.
narration.subtitle: bike_arcade_voice_start

narration.text: One chance left. The traffic has made its point.
narration.subtitle: bike_arcade_voice_last_life

narration.text: Run complete. The road has filed its final opinion.
narration.subtitle: bike_arcade_voice_result
